trends.name: 3D Crystal Moon Lamp with Custom Photo
trends.viral_hook: Personalised custom photo printed on 3D crystal moon lamp — unique gift idea with emotional resonance. ASMR-style unboxing and lighting transformation videos drive shares.
trends.notes: Personalisation trend continues strong. Great for gifting seasonal (Mother's Day, graduations). Low competition from Chinese suppliers on CJ/Spocket.

trends.name: Posture Corrector Device
trends.viral_hook: Before/after transformations showing posture improvement for remote workers. 'Worn for 30 days — what changed' format.
trends.notes: Work-from-home permanence driving sustained demand. Broad demographic appeal — office workers, gamers, elderly.

trends.name: Mini LED Projector
trends.viral_hook: Turn your bedroom wall into a movie theatre — compact, affordable, perfect for small spaces. 'TikTok made me buy it' format.
trends.notes: Summer outdoor movie season approaching. Higher ticket item ($50-150) means better commission per sale.

trends.name: Rechargeable Candle Lighter (Plasma Arc)
trends.viral_hook: Windproof electric arc lighter — satisfying spark effect, USB rechargeable, no gas needed. Satisfying ASMR ignition videos.
trends.notes: Low cost ($10-20), high volume potential. Works as impulse buy add-on. Eco-friendly angle appeals to sustainability crowd.

trends.name: Auto-Dimming Folding Smart Mirror
trends.viral_hook: LED-lit smart mirror with auto-dimming, foldable design — beauty vloggers showcase makeup application with perfect lighting.
trends.notes: Beauty community is highly engaged and purchases frequently. Good for ~$30-80 price point.

trends.name: Neck Fan (Portable Wearable)
trends.viral_hook: Hands-free personal fan — summer essential for commuting, outdoor work, and events. Dual-blade design.
trends.notes: Seasonal peak approaching (Northern Hemisphere summer). Classic seasonal trending product with predictable demand surge.

trends.name: Smart Water Bottle
trends.viral_hook: Tracks water intake, syncs to phone app, LED reminders to hydrate. Health-tech crossover.
trends.engagement_estimate: 5,000+ recent Amazon reviews, trending in health categories
trends.notes: Higher price point ($40-80) but more niche audience. Wellness trend supporting sustained interest.

trends.name: Instant Cup Noodle Maker
trends.viral_hook: Quick microwave meal prep gadget — college students and busy professionals. ASMR food prep content.
trends.notes: Low price point ($10-20), high volume. College/student demographic is price-sensitive but high conversion.

trends.name: Adjustable Laptop Desk (Bed Tray)
trends.viral_hook: Work-from-home/study comfort — adjustable height, foldable, laptop + snacks built-in. Desk setup content.
trends.notes: Remote work trend continues to fuel demand. Versatile — students, WFH professionals, gamers.

trends.name: Foldable Electric Kettle (Travel)
trends.viral_hook: Silicone collapsible travel kettle — boils water in 3 mins, packs flat. Travel hack content on YouTube.
trends.engagement_estimate: 150%+ sales increase reported, strong YouTube review coverage
trends.notes: Travel season approaching. Unique USP (foldable) makes it stand out from standard kettles.

trends.name: Water Flosser (Cordless)
trends.viral_hook: Better than string flossing — dental hygiene upgrade with visible 'proof' shots of removed debris.
trends.notes: Dental aesthetics content performs well. Recurring purchase (replacement heads) adds long-term value.

trends.name: Pet Hair Remover (ChomChom-style)
trends.viral_hook: Satisfying before/after of pet hair removal from furniture. 'Look how much hair this removed' reveal format.
trends.engagement_estimate: 1M+ views, high share rate across pet communities
trends.notes: Pet owner market is massive and emotionally engaged. Reusable design appeals to eco-conscious buyers.

trends.name: Portable Photo Printer (Mini Pocket)
trends.viral_hook: Print wallet-sized photos instantly from your phone — scrapbooking, journaling, photo wall content.
trends.notes: Good margins on printer + recurring revenue from paper/ink refills. Journaling/scrapbooking trend on TikTok.

trends.name: Organza Jewelry Bags (Bulk)
trends.viral_hook: Aesthetic small business packaging — jewellery storage and gift-giving with cute drawstring bags. 'Small biz packaging haul' content.
trends.notes: Niche — targets small business owners and resellers. Low per-unit price but bulk orders increase value.

trends.name: LED Strip Lights (Smart RGBIC)
trends.viral_hook: Room transformation videos — gaming setups, bedroom aesthetics, music-synced lighting displays.
trends.notes: Evergreen TikTok product — consistent volume year-round. Low price ($10-30), broad demographic. High competition.

source_summary: Searched: 'trending products TikTok May 2026 dropshipping', 'viral products Instagram reels 2026', 'winning products dropshipping 2026', 'products going viral on TikTok right now', 'ecommerce trends this week', 'viral Amazon products this week', 'trending TikTok products dropshippers are selling right now', 'tiktok made me buy it May 2026', 'best selling products on TikTok shop May 2026', 'new trending products TikTok spring 2026', 'viral gadget TikTok 2026'. Cross-referenced trends across TikTok, Instagram Reels, Amazon bestsellers, and YouTube. Data compiled from web search results. No CloakBrowser session used (stealth browsing not required for this search type).
